title: Subscriber Consent Type
description: Method by which subscribers were acquired and consented to receive the newsletter

enumDescriptions.explicit_optin: Subscriber actively opted in via a form or checkbox
enumDescriptions.double_optin: Subscriber confirmed via a verification email after initial signup
enumDescriptions.implied: Consent implied through an existing relationship (e.g., customer purchase)
enumDescriptions.purchased_list: Subscriber list was acquired from a third-party provider
